'''Osleo Prennert''' was a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Insider 92" /> During the [[Raid on Yavin 4|occupation]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], he was a [[Rebel sentry/Legends|sentry]] who manned a [[Recon-tower 4|recon-tower]] to watch over the jungle and [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] temples. Osleo was on duty as the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] set down outside the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]]. During his posting, he was armed with a [[DH-17 blaster pistol/Legends|DH-17 blaster pistol]] with an enlarged sensor scope.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Yavinsentry.jpg|thumb|left|200px]]
This character was played by [[Industrial Light & Magic]]'s [[Lorne Peterson]]. Of the three crew members who went to [[Wikipedia:Tikal|Tikal]] for filming, including [[Richard Edlund]] and [[Dick Alexander]], Peterson got the dangerous job of standing on the tower because he was the only one who did not have any children.<ref name="Lorne Peterson interview">{{SWYouTube|M7oQHQkNdkA|Steve Gawley and Lorne Peterson Interview with StarWars.com | Star Wars Celebration Anaheim}}</ref>

"Osleo Prennert" is an anagram of "Lorne Peterson."

The sentry station he stands inside was made from a 50-gallon garbage can that had cosmetic alterations.
